body:
Hey Amara, just wanted to follow up on our conversation from last week — I've been thinking more about the structure of the [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) term sheet and wanted to clarify one thing before we loop in legal. When we spoke on the 18th, I came away thinking we'd landed on an 8% post-money stake for the seed round, but my co-founder's notes say 6.5%, so I want to make sure we're all working from the same page before anyone drafts anything formal. The round itself we're targeting at $3.2M, which I believe is consistent with what you had in your model. Can you confirm what you have on your end for the equity figure? Happy to jump on a quick call today or tomorrow if that's easier than going back and forth over email.

— Jordan
